name: Finite State Machine
description: Implement a finite state machine (FSM) framework with two modules. The state_types module defines State, Transition, and Action types. The fsm_engine module implements the StateMachine that manages states, transitions with guards (conditions), and actions triggered on transitions.
test_imports: from state_types import State, Transition, Action
tests:
def test_basic_transition():
    sm = StateMachine('idle')
    sm.add_state(State('idle'))
    sm.add_state(State('running'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('start', 'idle', 'running'))
    assert sm.current_state == 'idle'
    sm.send('start')
    assert sm.current_state == 'running'

def test_invalid_event():
    sm = StateMachine('idle')
    sm.add_state(State('idle'))
    assert sm.send('unknown') == False
    assert sm.current_state == 'idle'

def test_guard_blocks():
    sm = StateMachine('locked', context={'pin': '1234'})
    sm.add_state(State('locked'))
    sm.add_state(State('unlocked'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('unlock', 'locked', 'unlocked', guard=lambda ctx: ctx.get('input') == ctx.get('pin')))
    sm.send('unlock')
    assert sm.current_state == 'locked'

def test_guard_allows():
    sm = StateMachine('locked', context={'pin': '1234', 'input': '1234'})
    sm.add_state(State('locked'))
    sm.add_state(State('unlocked'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('unlock', 'locked', 'unlocked', guard=lambda ctx: ctx.get('input') == ctx.get('pin')))
    sm.send('unlock')
    assert sm.current_state == 'unlocked'

def test_actions_executed():
    log = []
    sm = StateMachine('off')
    sm.add_state(State('off'))
    sm.add_state(State('on'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('toggle', 'off', 'on', actions=[Action('log', lambda ctx: log.append('turned_on'))]))
    sm.send('toggle')
    assert log == ['turned_on']

def test_on_enter_exit():
    log = []
    sm = StateMachine('a')
    sm.add_state(State('a', on_exit=lambda ctx: log.append('exit_a')))
    sm.add_state(State('b', on_enter=lambda ctx: log.append('enter_b')))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('go', 'a', 'b'))
    sm.send('go')
    assert log == ['exit_a', 'enter_b']

def test_available_events():
    sm = StateMachine('idle')
    sm.add_state(State('idle'))
    sm.add_state(State('running'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('start', 'idle', 'running'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('stop', 'running', 'idle'))
    assert sm.get_available_events() == ['start']

def test_history():
    sm = StateMachine('a')
    sm.add_state(State('a'))
    sm.add_state(State('b'))
    sm.add_state(State('c'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('go_b', 'a', 'b'))
    sm.add_transition(Transition('go_c', 'b', 'c'))
    sm.send('go_b')
    sm.send('go_c')
    assert sm.get_history() == ['a', 'b', 'c']
constraints: Actions execute in order when transition fires
send returns False if no valid transition found
